MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Sep-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT EDDIE SHAPIRO MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is DENIED. Plaintiff established (1) reasonable efforts to personally serve defendant Shapiro - more than a dozen times - and (2) a close connection between Shapiro and the Los Angeles office where substitute service was effectuated. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
